special_mechanics.name: Multiple Weapon Configuration System
special_mechanics.description: Player can select between four different weapon configurations before entering a stage. Each configuration includes different combinations of Speed-up, Multiples (Options), Missile, Double (laser), and Laser weapons.

physics_values.famicom_multiple_behavior: After selecting a fourth multiple, four multiples move around the spacecraft for 16 seconds

special_mechanics.name: Shield System
special_mechanics.description: Two types of shielding: Shield (front-only protection) and Force Field (full protection). Famicom version force field withstands 5 hits.

special_mechanics.name: Vic Viper Spacecraft
special_mechanics.description: Player controls the Vic Viper spaceship in horizontal scrolling shooter gameplay. Paradigm is shmup (shoot-em-up).

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). This is a Famicom port of an arcade game. The Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and feature descriptions but does not document precise physics parameters such as movement speed, acceleration, gravity, or jump physics. The game is primarily a horizontal scrolling shooter without traditional platforming jump mechanics as the primary control method.
